_doc: EEGDex manifest — NEW node (Muse EEG), per SIGNAL-ADAPTER brief Phase 3 (manifest-as-single-source). Carries the Phase-3 additions `evidence` (5-level ladder) + `goodDirection` per metric so codegen/dex-registry-gen.js projects eegdex-registry.js from ONE source. EEG is a genuinely new signal type — the adapter layer standardizes its INGEST; this manifest is the metric/grade source, not the DSP. Status: planned scaffold, not a shipped node.
description: Band-power and sleep-architecture analysis from consumer EEG (Muse). Direct spectral readouts, EEG-staged hypnogram, and derived micro-architecture markers.
warning: Consumer dry-electrode EEG (4-channel Muse) has higher artifact rates and lower spatial resolution than clinical PSG. Contact quality gates every downstream metric.

fields.eeg: Float32Array[ch] — µV, 256 Hz, 4 channels (TP9, AF7, AF8, TP10)
fields.timestamps: Float64Array — floating wall-clock ms per sample (Clock Contract)

sections.title: Signal & Contact
sections.description: Direct signal-quality readouts that gate everything downstream

metrics.name: Contact Quality
metrics.fullName: Fraction of the recording with all electrodes in good contact
metrics.cite: Per-channel contact quality — direct sensor readout

metrics.name: Analyzable
metrics.fullName: Fraction of the recording usable after artifact rejection
metrics.cite: Analyzable coverage after artifact rejection — direct

metrics.name: Total Spectral Power
metrics.cite: Broadband spectral power — direct from the PSD

sections.title: Band Powers
sections.description: Relative power in the canonical EEG bands

metrics.name: Relative Alpha
metrics.cite: Relative alpha power — established EEG band readout

metrics.name: Relative Theta
metrics.cite: Relative theta power — established EEG band readout

metrics.name: Alpha/Theta Ratio
metrics.fullName: Ratio of alpha to theta band power
metrics.cite: Alpha/theta ratio — published drowsiness/relaxation index, device-dependent

metrics.name: REM Fraction
metrics.fullName: Fraction of total sleep time scored REM from EEG
metrics.cite: EEG-staged REM fraction — EEG is the sleep-staging reference standard

metrics.name: Spindle Density
metrics.fullName: Sleep-spindle count per minute of N2
metrics.cite: Sleep-spindle density (11–16 Hz bursts) — published memory-consolidation marker, device-dependent

metrics.name: Frontal Alpha Asymmetry
metrics.fullName: ln(α right) − ln(α left) over frontal channels (AF7/AF8)
metrics.cite: Frontal alpha asymmetry — affective-state composite, EEGDex-derived, weak consumer-grade support

metrics.name: Calm Score
metrics.fullName: Composite relaxation index blended from band ratios
metrics.formula: weighted blend of α/θ, β suppression, and stability
metrics.cite: Calm score — heuristic wellness composite, not a validated EEG metric
